## Vendored OTDD library

Source: MIT-licensed OTDD packaged with [ORCA](https://github.com/sjunhongshen/ORCA) (upstream paper: *Cross-Modal Fine-Tuning: Align then Refine*).

Copied from `external_ORCA/src/otdd/otdd/` for monorepo use (no submodule).

Add to `PYTHONPATH` or install with `pip install -e ./third_party/orca_otdd` when wrapped with a top-level installer (not required—`run_experiment.py` prepends `third_party/orca_otdd` to `sys.path`).
